ksa_text: Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, issue tracking, decision logging, and follow-through on action items.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ability to interpret and incorporate data from multiple tool sources.
Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-008 (DG, Task) maps to Quantitative Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4312 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.431, onet=0.418, dcwf=0.401. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within quantitative analysis, statistical modeling, and financial analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4312 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-T-008 (DG, composite 0.4312) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4312 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4312 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4312, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
